text:
CCW_APL_LINK_KEY identifies each unique combination of submitting state entity code 
(SUBMTG_STATE_CD) and state plan identification number (MC_PLAN_ID). This is the unique key for 
linking all records in the APL base file to the APL supplemental files. Please note that there can be 
more than 1 record in the APL supplemental files for each CCW_APL_LINK_KEY. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
